data.title: 国际服主线Vol.6 第二章 更新
data.summary: [Main Story Update Notice] The Main Story Vol. 6 Oratorio of Days Gone By Ch.2 「 Saying Goodbye to Y
data.body:
[Main Story Update Notice]

The Main Story Vol. 6 Oratorio of Days Gone By
Ch.2 「 Saying Goodbye to Yesterday」 has been revealed.

A number of strange incidents occur across Arius Satellite School...What could be behind all of them?

#BlueArchive
